code_prompt_defaults.object_description_raven_strip: a 3 by 3 Raven-style matrix puzzle with four labeled image options below it
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_raven_card: a 3 by 3 Raven-style matrix puzzle with four labeled image options below it
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_raven_outline: a 3 by 3 Raven-style matrix puzzle with four labeled image options below it

raven_count_progression_label: Use the filled-cell count pattern across the matrix to choose the option that completes the missing lower-right cell.
Which labeled option completes the matrix when the visible rule is about counts of filled mini-grid cells?
Select the option whose number of filled cells fits the count progression in the matrix.
Choose the panel that belongs in the missing cell by following the filled-cell count pattern.
Identify the option that completes the 3 by 3 matrix under the filled-cell count rule.
raven_spatial_transform_label: Use the spatial arrangement changes across the matrix to choose the option that completes the missing lower-right cell.
Which labeled option completes the matrix when the visible rule changes the filled-cell arrangement?
Select the option whose mini-grid pattern fits the spatial arrangement rule.
Choose the panel that belongs in the missing cell by following how the arrangement changes.
Identify the option that completes the 3 by 3 matrix under the spatial pattern rule.
raven_set_operation_label: Use how filled-cell patterns combine across the matrix to choose the option that completes the missing lower-right cell.
Which labeled option completes the matrix when the visible rule combines filled-cell patterns?
Select the option whose filled cells fit the pattern-combination rule.
Choose the panel that belongs in the missing cell by following how filled cells are combined.
Identify the option that completes the 3 by 3 matrix under the filled-cell combination rule.
raven_analogical_transform_label: Use the systematic visual-attribute changes across the matrix to choose the option that completes the missing lower-right cell.
Which labeled option completes the matrix when the visible rule changes object attributes?
Select the option whose object attributes fit the analogical pattern.
Choose the panel that belongs in the missing cell by following the attribute transformations.
Identify the option that completes the 3 by 3 matrix under the attribute rule.
raven_position_progression_label: Use the marker-position progression across the matrix to choose the option that completes the missing lower-right cell.
Which labeled option completes the matrix when the visible rule moves a marker through the mini-grid?
Select the option whose marker position fits the matrix progression.
Choose the panel that belongs in the missing cell by following the position pattern.
Identify the option that completes the 3 by 3 matrix under the marker-position rule.
raven_feature_binding_label: Use how two visual properties vary systematically across the matrix to choose the option that completes the missing lower-right cell.
Which labeled option completes the matrix when two visual properties are jointly patterned?
Select the option whose paired visual properties fit the matrix rule.
Choose the panel that belongs in the missing cell by following how the visual properties combine.
Identify the option that completes the 3 by 3 matrix under the paired-property rule.
